findings.issue: Static file serving uses simple path prefix check, not fully hardened against traversal
findings.fix: For production, use a more robust check (e.g., path.resolve and ensure within publicDir), but acceptable for spike

findings.issue: Public/app.js detail view expects socialStrategy/reviewThemes/featureRequests arrays; safe fallback via (items||[]) exists
findings.fix: No change needed, but ensure fixture data includes these fields

findings.issue: Live data adapters (Apple, Apify) are scaffolded but not integrated into main flow in this pass
findings.fix: Future: connect refreshApps to live adapters when tokens are set; currently fixture-only is acceptable

suggested_next_steps: Add tests for API endpoints using Node test runner with mock server
Wire live adapters into ingest.js for 'live' mode with environment variable guards
Add Qlty and Promptfoo configurations to the workflow orchestration layer
